title: Parity: schc (Rust/Zephyr/Python)
description: Policy: three-impl parity. Module: schc. Rust: complete (2011 LoC). Zephyr: complete (1489 LoC). Python: complete (1479 LoC). Gap: none - full parity across all three implementations.
close_reason: Verified compliant: All three SCHC implementations (Rust 2051 LoC, Python 1506 LoC, Zephyr ~2700 LoC combined) have full feature parity. Rules 0-4 plus 255 fallback are implemented identically. Fragmentation (ACK-on-Error mode) with FragmentSender, FragmentReceiver, ACK encode/decode, and CRC32 MIC is present in all three. Zephyr separates generic SCHC engine (fragmentation + profile dispatch in /subsys/schc/) from LICHEN-specific rules (/subsys/lichen/schc/), which is a good architectural split.
